location.name: Art appraisers in Phoenix, Arizona
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Phoenix, Arizona.

listedAppraisers.name: ABD Antique Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: ABD Antique Appraisers offers fine art appraisal services serving Phoenix, AZ. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.name: Allison Gee Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Allison Gee Fine Art Appraisals offers fine art appraisal services serving Phoenix, AZ. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.name: AppraiseItNow
listedAppraisers.description: Modern online-first appraisal service with certified specialists for each asset type. Offering convenient digital submissions with expedited processing available.

listedAppraisers.name: Arizona Art Appraisals & Advisory
listedAppraisers.description: Arizona Art Appraisals & Advisory provides comprehensive fine art appraisals and advisory services to collectors and estates throughout the Phoenix and Scottsdale area.

listedAppraisers.name: Arizona Certified Appraisal Group
listedAppraisers.description: Arizona Certified Appraisal Group offers fine art appraisal services serving Phoenix, AZ. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.name: Art Fortune LLC
listedAppraisers.description: Art Fortune LLC provides certified art and antique appraisals in Scottsdale and the greater Phoenix area. Their certified appraisers ensure precise evaluations based on the most relevant information, providing clarity on the true market value.

listedAppraisers.name: Baker Appraisers (Asian Antique Appraisers)
listedAppraisers.description: Specialists in Asian art and antiques with extensive knowledge of Chinese, Japanese, and Korean artifacts. Available for both in-person and remote appraisals.

listedAppraisers.name: Bentley Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Bentley Gallery is one of the Southwest's most distinguished contemporary art galleries, providing appraisal and advisory services.

listedAppraisers.name: Collier Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Collier Gallery has been serving the Phoenix art community for over 41 years, offering fine art and antique appraisal services.

listedAppraisers.name: Desert Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Desert Fine Art Appraisals provides expert fine art and Southwestern art appraisals for collectors, galleries, and institutions throughout the Phoenix metropolitan area.

listedAppraisers.name: Ed Mell Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: The Ed Mell Gallery showcases current artworks and at times earlier pieces from Ed Mell's personal collection. Located in Phoenix's historical Coronado neighborhood.

listedAppraisers.name: Modified Arts
listedAppraisers.description: Modified Arts is a contemporary art gallery on Roosevelt Row providing exhibitions and art services to the Phoenix community.

listedAppraisers.name: Phoenix Art Group Inc
listedAppraisers.description: Phoenix Art Group has been a fixture in the Phoenix art scene for nearly six decades, providing art consultation and appraisal services.

listedAppraisers.name: Prestige Estate Services
listedAppraisers.description: Established practice with multi-generational expertise in estate services and art appraisals. Our team includes renowned experts Elizabeth Lovett and Stephanie Calman.

listedAppraisers.name: Savvy Collector
listedAppraisers.description: Savvy Collector specializes in art appraisal services and is listed as both an art gallery and professional appraiser in Phoenix.

listedAppraisers.name: Sims Appraisal
listedAppraisers.description: Sims Appraisal offers fine art appraisal services serving Phoenix, AZ. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.name: Sonoran Appraisal Services
listedAppraisers.description: Sonoran Appraisal Services provides professional fine art and personal property appraisals throughout the Phoenix metro area, serving collectors, estates, and insurance clients.

listedAppraisers.name: Valley Art Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: Valley Art Appraisers has served the Phoenix and Scottsdale area for over 20 years, providing comprehensive appraisals for fine art, antiques, jewelry, and decorative arts.
